refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area by identifying terrain features, detecting obstacles, and representing the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad worksite mapping requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and targeted verification for each critical aspect of the worksite model.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through sensor data validation for terrain and obstacle detection, and confirm work-zone representation accuracy via comparison with ground truth or site plans.
sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect obstacles within the worksite area
Represent the work-zone accurately in the model

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle analysis
Apply real-time data processing algorithms for feature extraction
Generate digital work-zone maps with geospatial tagging
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion combined with real-time processing algorithms to generate a digital work-zone map with terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms
Integration of sensor fusion outputs into a unified work-zone map
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically integrates sensing and mapping functions with manageable coupling through well-defined data flows.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in all worksite conditions
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model fidelity
High safety criticality demands robust error detection and fallback mechanisms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data processing to isolate faults and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, processing, and generating the worksite model

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) for processing

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to planning and execution modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote monitoring and control systems

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module containing the mapping functionality with minimal diffusion.
Vehicle module may have some sensor hardware but limited processing responsibility.
Teleoperation focuses on control, not mapping.
Safety Services may consume mapping data but does not implement mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Mapping functionality is best centralized within the NGHE Solution module to ensure data integrity and reduce diffusion risks.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex
Integration challenges with sensor hardware residing in Vehicle module
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting sensor data acquisition (Vehicle) and processing (NGHE Solution) to clarify ownership and reduce complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well-defined and the selected DP logically satisfies the functional requirements with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Some sensor data acquisition responsibility overlaps with Vehicle module, which may cause interface complexity.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Centralizing mapping processing in NGHE Solution reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing data flows through Telemetry and Tasking interfaces and validating the generated worksite model.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functionality to NGHE Solution with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Clarify interface boundaries between Vehicle sensor hardware and NGHE Solution processing.
Consider modularizing sensor data acquisition to reduce complexity.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, interface boundaries between Vehicle and NGHE Solution require clarification to reduce integration risks and improve ownership clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect obstacles within the worksite area
Represent the work-zone accurately in the model

revise.why: To clarify and possibly separate sensor data acquisition (Vehicle) from processing and mapping (NGHE Solution) to reduce diffusion and integration risks.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliably available via Telemetry interface.
NGHE Solution module has sufficient processing capability.
open_risks: Integration complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
Potential performance bottlenecks in centralized processing.
evidence_needed: Interface specifications between Vehicle sensors and NGHE Solution.
Performance benchmarks for sensor data processing.
